Defendant The Scotts Company¿S Motion For The Court¿S Appointment Of Dr. Victor Roggli As An Expert Witness To Testify At Trial Pursuant To Evidence Code § 730
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Erin K. Hayner, Esq., of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG (213-486-8021) appearing for defendant / moving party The Scotts Company
Laurel Halbany, Esq., of WATERS KRAUSE & PAUL (800-226-9880), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Joanne O. Denham, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT THE SCOTTS COMPANY'S MOTION FOR THE COURT'S APPOINTMENT OF DR. VICTOR ROGGLI AS AN EXPERT WITNESS TO TESTIFY AT TRIAL PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE 730

Hearing held. The Court denied defendant The Scotts Company's motion to appoint Dr. Victor L. Roggli as an expert witness to testify at trial pursuant to Evidence Code section 730. The hearing is continued to March 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. for an Order to Show Cause why this Court should not impose sanctions on this kind of motions. Counsel for plaintiff to prepare an order for the Court's signature. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Jennifer Seelenbacher, CSR #11878 = (503/TLJ)
